Event: Gladiator Adventure
Event Date: 15/05/2025
Sage Bot Item Code: O30
Great Pontiff Orb

Once in a while magically binds all enemy units for 5 sec and deals 650000 (+bonus of spell power) magic damage to them. While the binding is active, 35% of damage taken by one of the bound units is dealt to the rest of the bound units.

Requirements: 98-100

User rating: item not rated yet

First trigger: 5 sec

Cooldown: 9 secs
